slides.title: Why collaboration is localized
slides.html: Framing. “Localized” means tuned to this team, this offer rhythm, and these proof gates — not generic training theater.

slides.title: What you will do here
slides.html: Flow. Each episode follows Listen → Slide → Engage so progress stays honest and portable across surfaces.

options.label: Collaboration in this journey is mainly about adding more meetings.
Collaboration here means shared context, clear handoffs, and proof — not noise.
